---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem statement

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the use case clearly.

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like. If you have a rough API or UI sketch in mind, include it here.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about and why you ruled them out.

## Additional context

Screenshots, links to related issues, or any other supporting information.
